subcodes.first_line: O Ḥusayn! Hearken unto the call of this Ḥusayn, at a time when the hounds of hatred have encompassed him in this pit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حسین اسمع ندآء هذا الحسین حین الذی احاطه کلاب البغضا فی  هذالبئر
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
